testcase.name: login
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchWindowException: Browsing context has been discarded Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: 77fd4da2-c10e-4829-b762-0f2ca27cbab9 at testcase.name: verify

testcase.name: logOutOrangeHRM
